name: yarn
explanation: YARN's check hits the ResourceManager REST API at well-known paths under `/ws/v1/cluster` (metrics, apps, nodes, scheduler). The ResourceManager web UI defaults to port 8088 across Hadoop versions and the `/ws/v1/cluster/metrics` JSON endpoint is universal, unauthenticated by default. A single HTTP probe to `http://%%host%%:8088/ws/v1/cluster/metrics` confirms the integration target. No credentials are required in the default mode.
notes: Kerberos-secured clusters (SPNEGO) would force the integration into credentials-required mode, but the upstream default deployment leaves the REST API open. HA setups expose multiple RM hosts; only the active one responds to metric requests.
